examples: This is nonrefundable, even if the source of the mineral is less prevalent than the lessee predicted it to be or if it is in an unextractable form.
Once the commodity rights are leased, the lessee will issue the owner an up-front payment to explore the property and investigate possible ways to extract the commodity.
Payment of all building and land taxes shall be borne solely by the Lessee.
If the lessor fails to get paid that means that the lessee has defaulted on his lease obligation.
The lessee, by contrast, is not obligated to purchase the item.
